creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
I compiled with the options and rebooted the systems for the following releases but all of my kernels booted okay:

13-CURRENT i386
12-STABLE i386
11.2-RELEASE i386
11.2-RELEASE amd64

I couldn't get 11.1-RELEASE bootable imagers as 11.1-RELEASE support has been expired.
It looks either this bug cannot be reproduced or has been fixed.
